caption: In a retail store featuring O'Neill branded clothing, a person wearing a pink t-shirt and a gray baseball cap stands before a rack of dark jackets. As the sequence progresses, the person uses their hands to interact with the clothing, moving their arms in a way that triggers a shimmering, purple-and-white sparkle effect on screen. Overlaid text appears and evolves across the frames, beginning with "25% OFF JACKETS" and expanding to "25% OFF HOODIES JACKETS & SWEATERS". The background reveals a variety of merchandise, including blue shirts, folded clothing on shelves, and red bags hanging on the wall. The person's movements and the growing text suggest a promotional highlight of the store's current sales on outerwear.
